---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature, endpoint, or functionality for OpenForge.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

### 💡 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when...")

### 🚀 Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain how this feature will work and how it benefits OpenForge.

### 🔄 Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

### 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, wireframes, mockups, or diagrams about the feature request here.

### 🙋 Assignment
- [ ] I would like to work on this issue and be assigned to it.
